name: AC power
Description: positive vlaue means feeds power into the grid

name: backup function
Description:
whether to enable the backup function
0: enable  1: disable

name: WIFI name
Description: Write the Wi-Fi name and append a \0 character to indicate the end of the string

name: WIFI password(only write)
Description: Write the Wi-Fi name, and after writing the \0 character, it indicates the configuration of the Wi-Fi is completed

name: rs485 control mode
Description:
reg 42000-42999 only work before enable this reg
0x55aa: enable 485 control mode // 0x55bb: disable 485 control mode

name: charge to SOC
Description:
Force charge and discharge to the target SOC, and turn off the SOC when finished.[10,100%].
(Enabling this mode turns off the forced charge and discharge mode)

name: discharge time1 week
Description:
bit1: Monday  bit2:Tuesday  bit3: Wednesday
bit4: Thursday bit5:Friday  bit6: Saturday  bit7:Sunday

name: discharge time1 end
Description:
range:[0,2359]
the end time must be longer than the start time
